title: hieracium pallescens subsp. macranthoides
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. macranthoides, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pallescens subsp. macranthoides lie in its ability to act as a mild diuretic and to support liver function. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of liver and gallbladder issues, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pallescens subsp. macranthoides can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal uses.
